title: Community Request
description: Schema for an SAP Experience Garage community feature request captured via Teams Bot or Business Unit chat

request_id.description: Unique identifier in the format CR-1001, CR-1002, etc.

submitted_by.description: User identifier; synthetic_user_001 in demo, real AAD UPN in production

department.description: SAP business unit or department of the submitter

source.description: Channel through which the request was submitted

entry_point.description: Specific entry point within the Teams surface

raw_request.description: Verbatim text of the original request as typed by the user

cleaned_request.description: Bot-normalized, concise version of the request

problem.description: The pain point or underlying problem the user described

desired_outcome.description: What the user hopes to achieve if this request is fulfilled

feature_category.description: High-level category for the requested feature (e.g. Learning Experience, ML Tooling)

capability_area.description: Specific capability area within the Experience Garage platform

urgency.description: How urgently the submitter needs this feature

frequency.description: How often the submitter encounters this pain point

affected_workflow.description: Which Experience Garage workflow is affected

interview_opt_in.description: Whether the user agreed to a follow-up interview

preferred_follow_up_method.description: How the user prefers to be contacted for follow-up

interview_context.description: Any extra context the user provided about their availability or use case

similar_request_count.description: Number of similar requests in the dataset; populated by the recommendation engine

status.description: Current processing status of the request
